name: Water Sort Puzzle   Italian Brainrot
description: Pour, sort, and relax! Water Sort Puzzle - Italian Brainrot is a casual, fun, and relaxing sorting game that brings you a splash of colorful excitement. Your goal is simple: sort the colored liquids into the bottles until each bottle contains only one color, and unlock beautiful collectible Italian Brainrot images. Test your logic, calm your mind, and build your own gallery as you master the art of sorting water!
instructions: Use mouse to play this colorful sorting games
